settings.heading: OUR MISSION
settings.description: Afinah Closet is your destination for premium modest fashion. We curate elegant hijabs and abayas that celebrate timeless style and modern grace. Based in Los Angeles, we're committed to quality, authenticity, and empowering women through beautiful, modest wear.
settings.newsletter_description: Subscribe to receive exclusive updates, new arrivals, styling tips, and special offers delivered straight to your inbox.
